# Pactum

> AI-powered hiring assessment platform that tests how well candidates use AI tools on real work tasks, not whether they can memorize algorithms.

## What Pactum Does

Pactum replaces LeetCode-style tests and open-ended take-home assignments with structured, AI-native hiring assessments. Candidates complete realistic job tasks (email, code review, written analysis, slide deck) using built-in AI tools. Pactum records every prompt, every revision, and every decision, then scores the session automatically on technical depth, AI fluency, and output quality.

Hiring teams get a ranked list of candidates with detailed session replays and automatic scores — no manual review required.

## Who It's For

- Hiring managers and talent acquisition teams at SaaS, fintech, and marketing companies
- Teams hiring for roles where AI tool proficiency matters (engineering, product, marketing, operations)
- Companies frustrated with LeetCode tests that reward memorization, or take-homes that top candidates skip

## Key Differentiators

- Tests AI fluency, not memory — candidates use AI tools as part of the task
- Full session capture — every prompt, revision, and decision is recorded
- Automatic scoring — no manual review, no rubric writing
- Async and candidate-friendly — focused tasks that respect candidate time
- Real work tasks — email, code review, written analysis, slide deck (not algorithm puzzles)

## Pricing

- Starter: $99/month — up to 5 active assessments, unlimited candidates
- Professional: $549/month — unlimited assessments, custom rubric builder, priority support

Full pricing: https://pactum.so/#pricing

- Homepage: https://pactum.so
